title: rubus graniticus
intro: Rubus graniticus, also known as the granite raspberry, is a species of bramble native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and flavonoids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus graniticus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing protection against certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
